overview: Complete organizational website for Azad Hind United Squad — a military-style youth training organization under the Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports, Govt. of India. Features public sections for the organization's mission, leadership, training programs, gallery, admission info, and a protected admin panel for content management.
features: Military-themed homepage with auto-sliding image carousel and hero section
Leadership, training, camps, and branches sections with full organization data
Photo and video gallery with lightbox preview and admin upload/delete management
Protected admin panel with Internet Identity login for content management
Contact form with backend storage, Google Map embed, and admission details
Mobile-responsive army/NCC design with khaki, dark green, black, and white theme
